en_title: Xbox Boss Says a Mass Audience Can't Afford 'Thousands of Dollars' to Spend on a Next-Gen Console, So Microsoft Must 'Look at New Business Models'
cn_title: Xbox负责人：下一代主机不能太贵，微软需探索新商业模式
subtitle: 不差钱？不存在的
opus_summary: Xbox负责人阿莎·夏尔玛表示，未来主机价格可能高达数千美元，普通大众难以承受，微软需探索新商业模式。

paragraphs.en: The spiralling cost of new and existing consoles will require "radically different business models" over the coming generation, Xbox boss Asha Sharma has said.
paragraphs.cn: Xbox负责人阿莎·夏尔玛表示，新老主机成本的螺旋式上升将要求下一代主机采用「截然不同的商业模式」。

paragraphs.en: Speaking to Fortune , Sharma acknowledged the increasing price of existing hardware and components — fuelled by global crises and the rise of AI — and said the industry had "reached a point where it will be hard to imagine" mass audiences still being able to afford "thousands of dollars" for a new console generation.
paragraphs.cn: 夏尔玛在接受《财富》采访时承认，受全球危机和人工智能崛起推动，现有硬件和组件价格不断上涨，并表示行业已经「到了一个难以想象」大众消费者还能承受「数千美元(约合人民币71600元)」来购买新一代主机的程度。

paragraphs.en: For the first time, the current PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X/S generation of consoles have seen price increases rather than cost savings over the course of the past five years. Microsoft and Sony have repeatedly raised prices on hardware, accessories and gaming subscriptions. Nintendo has also not been immune, and recently acknowledged it would up the price of Switch 2, just over a year after its arrival.
paragraphs.cn: 过去五年中，当前的PlayStation 5和Xbox Series X/S世代主机首次出现价格上涨而非成本下降。微软和索尼多次提高硬件、配件和游戏订阅的价格。任天堂也未能幸免，最近承认将在Switch 2上市仅一年多后上调其价格。

paragraphs.en: Hardware manufacturers have struggled over the past half decade with increasing demand for components such as processors, which are being used by power hungry AI data centers. Production and shipping costs have also ballooned due to tariffs and logistical problems prompted by global conflict.
paragraphs.cn: 过去五年，硬件制造商一直面临处理器等组件需求增长的压力——这些组件正被耗电巨大的人工智能数据中心大量使用。生产与运输成本也因全球冲突引发的关税和物流问题而急剧膨胀。

paragraphs.en: All of which has pushed the current cost of consoles higher — while it's believed the next generation of consoles are still years away, as manufacturers look to land on a suitable leap in power that's still affordable.
paragraphs.cn: 这一切都推高了当前主机的成本——尽管下一代主机被认为仍需数年才会到来，因为制造商正试图在性能飞跃与价格可承受之间找到平衡。

paragraphs.en: Sharma's comments suggest, however, that whatever Xbox does do next, it cannot simply rely on having the most powerful hardware to be successful — a tactic Microsoft has tried, only to still find itself far behind Sony in terms of console sales.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，夏尔玛的评论表明，无论Xbox下一步做什么，都不能仅仅依靠最强大的硬件来取得成功——微软曾尝试过这一策略，结果在主机销量上仍远落后于索尼。

paragraphs.en: "We will continue to look at new business models, I think is needed for console, rather than just the most premium, high-performance console in the world," Sharma said. "I think we've reached a point where it will be hard to imagine that mass audiences can afford thousands of dollars to spend on a console generation. And so I think we will start to see radically different business models that we never expected start to come into orbit later this year."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们将继续探索新的商业模式，我认为主机需要的是这个，而不仅仅是世界上最顶级的高性能主机，」夏尔玛说。「我认为我们已经到了一个难以想象大众消费者能承受数千美元(约合人民币71600元)来购买一代主机的程度。因此，我认为我们将在今年晚些时候开始看到我们从未预料到的截然不同的商业模式进入轨道。」

paragraphs.en: It's a comment that feels somewhat ironic, considering Sharma's recent recommitment to building a next generation Xbox console — currently codenamed Project Helix . And especially so after Sharma swiftly axed the unpopular "This is an Xbox" marketing campaign, that told customers their phone or smart TV could also access Xbox games.
paragraphs.cn: 考虑到夏尔玛近期重申要打造下一代Xbox主机（目前代号Project Helix），这番话显得有些讽刺。尤其是在她迅速叫停不受欢迎的「This is an Xbox」营销活动之后——该活动告诉消费者，他们的手机或智能电视也能玩Xbox游戏。

paragraphs.en: Is Sharma suggesting Microsoft will again offer a lower-powered console alternative, such as the current Xbox Series S ? Is this a hint that Microsoft is still interested in its handheld plans, which have so far been limited to its partnership with Asus for the ROG Ally X? Or is this about considering alternative purchase models for consumers — leasing hardware, or offering it via a subscription, as Microsoft has done previously?
paragraphs.cn: 夏尔玛是在暗示微软将再次提供性能较低的主机选项（例如当前的Xbox Series S）？这是否暗示微软仍对其掌机计划感兴趣——目前仅限于与华硕合作推出ROG Ally X？还是说，这关乎为消费者考虑替代购买模式——例如租赁硬件，或像微软之前那样通过订阅提供？

paragraphs.en: "We must think about other ways to think about the cost construction of the console," Sharma said. "We must think about how we create different plans, so more people can participate in the console. We must think about partnerships that will allow us to have better distribution and reach, and we must think about the experiences that we're creating outside of that as well to reach new audiences."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们必须思考其他方式来考虑主机的成本结构，」夏尔玛说。「我们必须思考如何制定不同的方案，让更多人能够参与主机游戏。我们必须思考能够让我们拥有更好分销和覆盖范围的合作伙伴关系，并且我们还必须思考在此之外创造怎样的体验来触达新受众。」

paragraphs.en: Despite all these challenges, Sharma said she expects demand to outstrip supply when Project Helix is eventually released.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管面临这些挑战，夏尔玛表示她预计Project Helix最终发售后，需求将超过供应。

paragraphs.en: "There's more demand than there is supply for our Gen-9 console, and I suspect the same will be there with our Gen-10 console," Sharma said. "I'm excited about it. It's a console that's also going to allow you to play your PC games. It's going to have backward compatibility. It's going to have leading-end performance. But there's material work to do to make sure that it is available to the people that want to want to play. And so we're working on that."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们的第九代主机供不应求，我怀疑第十代主机也会如此，」夏尔玛说。「我对此感到兴奋。这是一款还能让你玩PC游戏的主机。它将具备向下兼容性。它将拥有顶尖性能。但要确保它能够提供给想要玩的人，还有很多实质性的工作要做。我们正在为此努力。」

paragraphs.en: While the solution remains vague, the issue certainly feels a pressing one to solve. As consoles edge towards the $1,000 mark, some gaming fans feel there's now little difference in price than simply switching to PC, while others have expressed concern that the next generation of hardware will be the most expensive ever.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然解决方案仍不明确，但这个问题无疑亟待解决。随着主机价格逼近1000美元(约合人民币7160元)大关，一些游戏玩家认为这与直接转向PC在价格上已相差无几，而另一些人则担心下一代硬件将成为有史以来最昂贵的。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。
